# jamfschool_profile (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jamf School configuration profile by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jamfschool_profile" "example" {
  id = 10
}

output "profile_name" {
  value = data.jamfschool_profile.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Unique identifier.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description.
- `identifier` (String) Profile identifier.
- `location_id` (Number) Location ID.
- `name` (String) Profile name.
- `platform` (String) Platform.
